title: Second worker dies at BYD's Hungary factory already under scrutiny for labor practices
summary_full: A second worker died at the construction site of BYD's electric vehicle factory in Hungary, CNBC has learned.
summary_public: A second worker died at the construction site of BYD's electric vehicle factory in Hungary, CNBC has learned.
